decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counter spells, removal spells, and card draw. It utilizes cards like Granite Gran, Accumulate Wisdom, and Consult the Star Charts to draw cards and set up for later plays. Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson are used for removal and dealing damage to opponents' creatures. Monument to Endurance and Artist's Talent provide additional card advantage and value. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents through careful resource management and strategic play.

This deck focuses on quickly building up your board with efficient creatures and using pump spells to make them even more threatening. By ramping with mana dorks like Llanowar Elves and utilizing powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Mightform Harmonizer, you can overwhelm your opponent early on. Additionally, the inclusion of removal spells like Erode and Earthbender Ascension help you maintain control of the battlefield. Overall, this deck aims to pressure your opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells to secure a quick victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build a strong board presence with low-cost creatures and then use efficient removal spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By playing aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Ouroboroid, the deck can put pressure on the opponent early on. The inclusion of cards like Gene Pollinator and Brightglass Gearhulk allows for additional value generation and protection for key creatures. With a mix of creatures and removal spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory in a Standard 1 vs 1 match.

This deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence with low-cost creatures and using powerful buffs to overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, the deck can create a threatening board early in the game. Earthbender Ascension and Erode provide additional power boosts, while cards like Lumbering Worldwagon and Mightform Harmonizer help maintain card advantage and pressure the opponent. With a mix of efficient creatures and spells, this aggro deck aims to pressure the opponent's life total and secure a quick victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The creatures in the deck offer additional control elements, such as bouncing enemy creatures or dealing damage. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its win condition, which can be achieved through card advantage or overwhelming the opponent with powerful spells. The mana base is designed to support the control strategy and ensure the deck has access to the necessary colors of mana.

The main idea behind this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and spells, focusing on the Mono Green color identity. By ramping up your mana with Llanowar Elves and other mana dorks, you can quickly play powerful threats like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. Cards like Dragon Sniper and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional threats and synergy, while Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve help protect your creatures and push damage through. The land base includes utility lands like Ba Sing Se and Escape Tunnel, along with fixing from Fabled Passage and Cavern of Souls.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures early on to put pressure on the opponent. The key strategy is to efficiently ramp up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension, allowing powerful high-cost creatures like Icetill Explorer and Keen-Eyed Curator to hit the board quickly. Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo provide additional early-game threats, while cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Mightform Harmonizer help protect and buff creatures. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage offer mana fixing, while Sapling Nursery provides additional creature generation. This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and powerful board presence.

The main concept of this Azorius Aggro deck is to quickly establish board presence with efficient, low-cost creatures like Aang, Swift Savior and Floodpits Drowner while utilizing disruptive spells such as Get Lost and Spell Snare to control the opponent's plays. Voice of Victory and High Noon provide additional support for your creatures, while Quantum Riddler and Avatar's Wrath offer ways to increase damage output and deal with opposing threats. The deck also includes cards like Airbender Ascension and Multiversal Passage for added versatility and potential surprise plays.

This Combo - Reanimator deck focuses on utilizing cards like Deceit and Requiting Hex to bring back powerful creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Overlord of the Balemurk from the graveyard. The deck also includes graveyard recursion spells like Winternight Stories and Deadly Cover-Up to keep the combo going. The goal is to quickly fill the graveyard with key creatures and then bring them back with various spells to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. The mana base includes various lands to ensure smooth mana curve for the deck.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a variety of spells and abilities that disrupt the opponent's strategy and limit their options. By utilizing cards like Resonating Lute, Consult the Star Charts, and Jeskai Revelation, the player can draw cards, gain life, and control the board. Inevitable Defeat and No More Lies serve as removal spells, while Flashback and Get Lost disrupt the opponent's hand. With a mix of counterspells, removal, and card draw, this deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through careful resource management and strategic play.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counterspells while utilizing the Izzet color combination. By utilizing a mixture of spells that can deal damage, draw cards, and protect your own creatures, the deck aims to out-value and outlast the opponent until victory. With a mix of creature removal, card advantage, and versatile spells, this deck seeks to control the battlefield and outmaneuver the opponent in order to secure a win.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to maintain a fast-paced aggressive strategy to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing low-cost creatures and spells, along with card draw and bounce effects, the deck aims to maintain a steady tempo while dealing consistent damage to the opponent. The use of versatile cards like Burst Lightning and Secret Identity allow for flexibility in dealing with threats and maintaining board control. Overall, the deck aims to quickly build up a threatening board presence and apply pressure to the opponent.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with a mix of spells and creatures that can deal damage efficiently. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Stormchaser's Talent, and Slickshot Show-Off, you can control the board while also dealing direct damage to your opponent. Using cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand helps you dig through your deck to find the cards you need to keep up the pressure. With a strong mana base and access to blue and red spells, this deck aims to be fast, aggressive, and versatile in its approach.

This deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent by playing cheap aggressive creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off. It also includes burn spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to clear the way and finish off the opponent. The deck has a low curve and aims to be proactive, utilizing cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand to dig for more threats. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Spell Pierce and Flow State helps to protect your creatures and maintain tempo. The deck also has a minor land destruction theme with Roaring Furnace/Steaming Sauna and Stormcarved Coast to disrupt the opponent's mana base.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and efficient burn spells. The goal is to maintain control of the board while dealing direct damage to the opponent's life total. The deck includes a variety of card draw and card advantage tools to keep the pressure on, along with some bounce spells to create tempo swings in your favor. The mana base is designed to support the deck's low curve and maximize the chances of casting spells on time.

The main strategy of this Izzet Control deck revolves around disrupting the opponent's plans and controlling the board through a combination of counter spells, removal, and card draw. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early defense, while cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand help to filter through the deck for key pieces. Sunderflock and Traumatic Critique offer removal options, while Prismari Charm provides versatility. Impractical Joke and Winternight Stories can disrupt the opponent's hand and plans, giving the player time to establish control and ultimately win the game.

This deck focuses on using low-cost creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. It heavily relies on mana acceleration from cards like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo to play bigger threats earlier. Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve provide a way to give creatures trample and extra power to push through blockers. The deck also includes cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Esper Origins to buff up the board and maintain pressure. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage help fix mana, while Ba Sing Se and Promising Vein provide additional resources.

This deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures. By utilizing mana acceleration with Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension, combined with powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, the deck aims to close out games quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Escape Tunnel provide additional versatility and ways to push damage through. The deck's goal is to apply constant pressure and force the opponent to react defensively.

The deck focuses on quickly building board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient mana ramp. It utilizes cards like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves to quickly accelerate mana production, allowing for early plays of powerful creatures like Esper Origins and Earthbender Ascension. The inclusion of cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Mightform Harmonizer help to maintain pressure on the opponent, while Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provide additional mana fixing and card advantage. The deck aims to establish a dominant board presence and close out games quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and aggressive gameplay, utilizing low-cost creatures and spells to build a strong board presence early on. The deck aims to quickly ramp up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo, allowing for powerful plays with cards like Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve. The inclusion of cards like Esper Origins and Keen-Eyed Curator provide additional card draw and resource management options, while the land base and Escape Tunnel ensure consistency and flexibility in gameplay.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a strong board presence of creatures in order to deal damage efficiently and effectively. By having a low mana curve and utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves for ramp, the deck aims to flood the board with creatures such as Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve to further enhance the creatures' power and abilities. Overall, the goal is to establish dominance on the battlefield and close out the game swiftly.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with low-cost creatures and utilizing creature buffs to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing mana accelerators like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension, the deck aims to flood the board with creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. Additionally, cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Meltstrider's Resolve provide additional boosts to increase the damage output. The inclusion of cards like Esper Origins and Royal Treatment allows for some control elements, while Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provide mana fixing to ensure consistent plays.

This deck focuses on quickly and aggressively building up a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. Utilizing cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension, it aims to rapidly overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of creatures while utilizing cards like Meltstrider's Resolve to protect its board. The inclusion of cards like Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage allow for mana fixing and potential card advantage. Overall, this mono green aggro deck seeks to establish dominance early in the game and maintain pressure throughout.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and pump spells, focusing on maximizing early game aggression with cards like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck also includes some late-game threats like Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Mossborn Hydra to ensure a strong finish. The mana base is designed to consistently provide the right colors of mana for the spells in the deck, while also including some utility lands like Hushwood Verge and Escape Tunnel for added flexibility.

The deck focuses on utilizing a mix of flying creatures and spells to aggressively control the board and deal damage quickly. Cards like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies provide consistent flying threats, while Quantum Riddler and Starfield Shepherd offer additional value through card draw and creature recursion. Haliya, Guided by Light and Nurturing Pixie help maintain board presence, while spells like Daydream and Seam Rip provide removal and disruption. The inclusion of Springleaf Drum allows for ramp and mana fixing, ensuring a smooth curve of threats and answers.

This Bant Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive early game plays using creatures like Badgermole Cub and Gene Pollinator. The deck also utilizes efficient ramp with cards like Llanowar Elves to quickly build up a board presence. Quantum Riddler provides card advantage while Spider Manifestation and Mockingbird offer evasive threats. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with creatures and use powerful pump spells like Nature's Rhythm and Seam Rip to finish games quickly. Key finishers include Brightglass Gearhulk and Craterhoof Behemoth, while control elements like Unable to Scream help maintain board advantage.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on fast creature aggression, using dragons and other flying creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. With a mix of powerful dragons like Magmatic Hellkite and Nova Hellkite, along with supportive cards like Clarion Conqueror and Voice of Victory, this deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of Sarkhan, Dragon Ascendant provides additional versatility and card advantage. Burst Lightning and Spectacular Tactics offer additional removal and combat tricks to help maintain board control. The deck's mana base is well-tuned for consistent early aggression.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to control the board by utilizing a combination of removal spells and card draw to outvalue the opponent. The deck aims to stall the game with defensive cards like Gran-Gran and Monument to Endurance while drawing into powerful spells like Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson to maintain control. By using a variety of instant speed removal and card advantage, the deck is able to dictate the pace of the game and outmaneuver opponents. The deck's win condition is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful spells and efficient creatures.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly attacking the opponent with low-cost creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Slickshot Show-Off, while using spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board. Elusive Otter helps to evade blockers, while Flow State and Stormchaser's Talent provide additional damage and card draw. The deck also includes some versatile utility cards like Opt and Into the Flood Maw. With a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and efficient resource management.

This deck focuses on using powerful aggressive creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The goal is to deal damage as quickly as possible while also controlling the board with bounce spells and removal. The key strategy is to maintain aggression while also maintaining card advantage through spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. The inclusion of cards like Secret Identity and Drake Hatcher adds a level of versatility to the deck, allowing for unexpected plays and surprise attacks. Overall, the deck aims to win the game swiftly through a combination of aggression and finesse.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively attack the opponent using a combination of cheap spells and creatures. By utilizing cards like Eddymurk Crab, Burst Lightning, and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain tempo throughout the game. The deck also includes a mix of control elements like Spell Pierce and Prismari Charm to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck focuses on efficient card draw and spell casting to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent with cheap and efficient creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, it aims to deal damage early and keep the opponent on the back foot. Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics provide versatile removal options while also dealing damage to the opponent. The deck also includes some card draw and counter spells to maintain tempo and protect its threats. Overall, this deck prioritizes speed and aggression to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on using low-cost and versatile spells to control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent, while also utilizing creatures with evasion abilities to apply pressure. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of burn spells, card draw, and evasive threats, leveraging its speed and efficiency to outpace the opponent and win the game before they can stabilize. The deck's key strategy is to maintain a high tempo and constantly apply pressure to force the opponent on the defensive, ultimately leading to a quick victory.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly establish board presence and apply pressure on the opponent by playing multiple low-cost creatures with abilities that can disrupt their game plan. The deck focuses on utilizing efficient card draw and removal spells to maintain tempo and keep the pressure on the opponent. The key strategy is to efficiently control the board and keep the opponent on the back foot, while also having the ability to finish them off with burst damage from spells or evasive creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to play fast and aggressively, overwhelming your opponent with a mix of creatures and instants to control the board and deal damage quickly. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, along with efficient creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab, you can create a fast tempo and keep the pressure on your opponent. The deck also includes some control elements like Spell Pierce and Boomerang Basics to disrupt your opponent's strategy and maintain your advantage. Additionally, the mana base is designed to support the deck's strategy by providing consistent access to colored mana sources.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. Eddymurk Crab, Hearth Elemental, and Sunderflock provide early game defense while Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm offer removal options. Traumatic Critique can disrupt opponent's strategies, while Sleight of Hand and Winternight Stories help dig for key cards. Get Out and Spell Pierce offer protection, while Spell Snare can counter important spells. The mana base consists of lands that can produce both blue and red mana efficiently. Overall, this deck aims to outlast opponents and win through attrition.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing powerful counterspells and removal spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy while also using card draw and scrying to maintain card advantage and find key pieces of the combo. The deck aims to stall the game until it can drop powerful finishers like Hearth Elemental and Sunderflock to close out the game. It also utilizes land manipulation to ensure it has the right colors of mana available when needed.

The deck focuses on controlling the board through a mix of counterspells, removal, and card draw. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early defense, while Sunderflock can deal with larger threats. Traumatic Critique and Spell Snare help control the opponent's spells, while Opt and Sleight of Hand ensure consistent card advantage. Winternight Stories can reset the board if needed. The mana base allows for flexibility in casting spells of both blue and red colors. Overall, the deck aims to outlast and outplay the opponent through efficient control tactics.

The main focus of this Jeskai Control deck is to control the game through a combination of card draw, removal, and counterspells. The deck utilizes cards like Tablet of Discovery and Consult the Star Charts to consistently draw cards, while Jeskai Revelation and Thunder Magic provide massive card advantage. Removal spells such as Sear and Swallowed by Leviathan deal with threats on the board, while counterspells like Essence Scatter and Traumatic Critique prevent the opponent from resolving key spells. The deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent while maintaining control of the game.

The key concept of this Jeskai Control deck is to use a variety of spells and abilities to control the game, generate card advantage, and outvalue the opponent. By utilizing cards like Tablet of Discovery, Consult the Star Charts, and Jeskai Revelation, the deck focuses on drawing cards and generating resources. With a mix of counter spells like Essence Scatter and removal spells like Swallowed by Leviathan, the deck aims to maintain board control and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, cards like Broadside Barrage and Thunder Magic provide additional removal options, while Stock Up helps refill the hand. Overall, this deck excels at controlling the pace of the game and overwhelming the opponent with its card advantage.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. By utilizing a combination of low-cost creatures like Bloodghast and Iron-Shield Elf, as well as powerful spells like Burst Lightning and Erode, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain board control. The inclusion of cards like Tersa Lightshatter and Cool but Rude also provide additional utility and versatility in combat situations. Overall, the deck is designed to be fast-paced and proactive, aiming to quickly close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying efficient creatures and controlling the board with removal spells. By combining aggressive creatures like Bloodghast and Marauding Mako with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Erode, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain board presence throughout the game. The deck also includes utility cards like Tersa Lightshatter and Practiced Offense to help push damage through. With a mix of solid creatures, removal, and disruption, this deck is designed to be fast and relentless in attacking the opponent.

The focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, supported by ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension. The deck also includes cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Escape Tunnel to protect and maneuver the creatures as needed. Additionally, cards like Esper Origins and Royal Treatment provide additional utility and card advantage. The mana base is structured to ensure consistent access to green mana sources. Overall, the deck aims to establish an early board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The main focus of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to swarm the battlefield with quick and efficient creatures to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to ramp up mana production and creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo to apply constant pressure, the deck aims to win the game early before the opponent can recover. With cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Escape Tunnel providing additional evasion and protection, the deck seeks to maintain board control and secure a swift victory.

The main concept of this deck is to flood the board with low-cost creatures and utilize creature abilities to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It focuses on aggressive plays and quick damage output using cards like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck also includes cards like Earthbender Ascension and Sapling Nursery to strengthen and protect your creatures. Additionally, cards like Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provide mana fixing and card draw to ensure a consistent flow of threats. The goal is to establish early board control and maintain pressure throughout the game.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and utilizing cards that buff and protect them. By boarding out but not much substance, this deck can overwhelm opponents with early attacks, while also having some utility with cards like Sapling Nursery and Earthbender Ascension. With a mix of creatures and spells to enhance their abilities, this deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and deal damage efficiently before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures such as Badgermole Cub and Gene Pollinator. It also includes cards like Nature's Rhythm and Seam Rip to disrupt the opponent's strategies and maintain the tempo of the game. The inclusion of powerful finishers like Craterhoof Behemoth and Goldvein Hydra ensures that the deck has the ability to close out games quickly. By combining efficient creatures with disruptive spells, this deck aims to outpace and outmuscle opponents in a fast-paced and aggressive manner.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of low-cost creatures and efficient creatures with abilities that can help push through damage. By utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Pawpatch Recruit, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on. Additionally, cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Gene Pollinator provide additional value and potential for big swings in the game. The deck aims to be fast-paced and aggressive, putting pressure on the opponent from the start.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures. It includes low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves to start generating early pressure, while also utilizing creatures like Mightform Harmonizer and Sazh's Chocobo to buff and enhance your board. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Mossborn Hydra and Lumbering Worldwagon to close out the game. With a mix of creature buffs and efficient creatures, this deck aims to establish dominance on the battlefield and outpace the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a strong board presence with fast, efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. By utilizing cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a steady stream of aggression. Supporting cards like Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam provide added versatility and resilience to the deck. The mana base is designed to ensure smooth mana curve and consistency in playing the deck's powerful cards. Overall, this deck aims to win through proactive, aggressive plays and maintaining constant pressure on the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, supported by spells like Earthbender Ascension and Erode to control the board and deal damage. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast creatures and powerful spells, utilizing the synergy between creatures like Sazh's Chocobo and Mightform Harmonizer. The deck also includes some high-impact creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Surrak, Elusive Hunter for late-game threats, while using lands like Fabled Passage and Hushwood Verge for mana fixing and ramp.

The deck focuses on maintaining control over the game by utilizing a combination of removal spells, card draw, and powerful creatures. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while generating card advantage and gradually out-valuing them. By carefully managing resources and planning ahead, the player can gradually establish dominance on the battlefield and secure victory through a mix of powerful spells, efficient creatures, and strategic decision-making. The deck's versatility allows for adapting to various game states and responding effectively to different threats, making it a formidable force in 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent with efficient creatures and cheap instant spells, while also disrupting their game plan with bounce spells and counterspells. The goal is to maintain a tempo advantage by constantly pressuring the opponent's life total and controlling the board with spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics. By utilizing cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand, the deck can draw into its threats and answers quickly, ensuring that it stays ahead in the race for board control and victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with aggressive creatures and low-cost spells. By using cards like Colorstorm Stallion and Eddymurk Crab to apply pressure early on, followed by Burst Lightning and other instant spells to control the board, the deck aims to maintain a fast tempo and finish the game before the opponent can set up their own strategies. The deck also includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Flow State to disrupt the opponent's plans and keep them on the back foot.
